compiled_state.title: Write RED test test_orientation_section_present for onboarding SKILL.md orientation section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Notes
Add test function `test_orientation_section_present` to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh`.

This is a structural boundary test per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5 (SKILL.md is a non-executable LLM instruction file — only structural boundary checks are appropriate).

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md` exists
- When: grep searches for structural section heading `^## Onboarding Overview`
- Then: grep exits 0 (section present); currently exits non-zero because section absent (RED state)

Implementation steps:
1. Open `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` and add a new test function `test_orientation_section_present` after the existing test functions, following the same `_snapshot_fail` + `assert_eq` pattern used by the other tests in the file.
2. The function should grep SKILL.md for `^## Onboarding Overview` and assert found.
3. Register the function in the run loop at the bottom of the file.
4. Append a new line to `.test-index` (do NOT modify the existing comma-separated line 86):
   `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_orientation_section_present]`
5. Confirm the test fails (RED) on unmodified SKILL.md before committing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Lint passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test_orientation_section_present function exists in test-onboarding-skill.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_orientation_section_present' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added in correct separate-line format
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh \[test_orientation_section_present\]' .test-index
- [ ] Test currently fails (RED) on unmodified SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*test_orientation_section_present'
